description:

• Which teams looked comfortable
• Who might be hiding performance

title: Every F1 Grand Slam of the 21st Century So Far
description:

title: Barcelona Shakedown EXPLAINED: Every F1 2026 Team’s Real Situation
description:
F1 2026 finally hit the track for real in Barcelona – and the first five days of running have given us a very early look at the new era.

On paper, Lewis Hamilton was fastest of the week for Ferrari with a 1:16.348.

But when you dig into the data, it’s Mercedes – with 500 laps on the W17 – and the power unit manufacturers who really stand out.

In this video, we go team by team through the full Barcelona shakedown:

• What each team actually did on track
• How many laps they completed
• Who sol

Zendaya leads an ensemble cast that also includes Maude Apatow, Angus Cloud, Eric Dane, Alexa Demie, Jacob Elordi, Barbie Ferreira, Nika King, Storm Reid, Hunter Schafer, Algee Smith and Sydney Sweeney. From behind the scenes content to exclusive interviews, subscribe to Euphoria for future videos from the show.

title: Formula 1 Theme Live in Concert by Brian Tyler
description:
Presenting my complete #Formula1 Theme that I conducted live in concert to commemorate an amazing F1 season. Thank you #F1 for having me be a part of the family! Congrats Lewis Hamilton on a brilliant championship & Fernando for years of greatness! #briantyler Orchestra: Philharmonia Orchestra of London
Royal Festival Hall, London
